creator: ian.cheong@acm.org
text:
made a new user. reboot machine. login. run terminal.

$ ck-list-sessions
Session2:
	unix-user = '1004'
	realname = 'User Test0'
	seat = 'Seat3'
	session-type = 'unspecified'
	session-class = 'user'
	session-state = 'online'
	active = FALSE
	x11-display = ':0'
	x11-display-device = ''
	display-device = '/dev/   ?   '
	remote-host-name = ''
	is-local = TRUE
	on-since = '2022-04-07T21:35:09.605578Z'
	login-session-id = ''
	XDG_RUNTIME_DIR = '/var/run/user/1004'
